args.text: checkout-us verified with v9.2.0 smoke checklist passing all checks.

args.subject: Checkout v9.2.0: rollout complete
args.body:
Checkout v9.2.0 rollout is complete across all three environments:

1. checkout-staging - deployed and verified
2. checkout-eu - deployed and verified
3. checkout-us - deployed and verified

All smoke checklist checks passed in each environment.
